ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player (e.g., 1B, 2B, SS, 3B, LF) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "career_start_year" TEXT /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_year" TEXT /* Year the player ended their professional career */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Player's batting and throwing handedness */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" TEXT /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start_year" TEXT /* Year the player's current contract starts */,
  "contract_end_year" TEXT /* Year the player's current contract ends */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the player's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., MLB, AAA) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., AL East, NL West) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Team's mascot */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the team's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Manager, Hitting Coach, Pitching Coach) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "start_year" TEXT /* Year the coach started their role */,
  "end_year" TEXT /* Year the coach ended their role */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Coach's throwing handedness */,
  "education" TEXT /* Coach's educational background */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications the coach holds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the coach's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity accessed (e.g., player, team) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_year" TEXT /* Year the player started with the team */,
  "end_year" TEXT /* Year the player left the team */,
  "transfer_fee" INTEGER /* Transfer fee paid when the player joined the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the player-team relationship information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
